# Pratham Sharma

> Pratham Sharma is a software engineer from India specialising in full-stack and AI development, with 3+ years of experience shipping production React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, and LLM-powered products. He currently builds AI document infrastructure at Leegality, used by 2,000+ businesses.

This is the personal portfolio of Pratham Sharma (GitHub: pratham7711). The canonical URL is https://www.prathamsharma.in/.

## About

- Name: Pratham Sharma
- Role: Software Engineer — Full-Stack & AI
- Current company: Leegality (legal-tech, India) — 2025 to present
- Years of experience: 3+
- Location: India
- Email: prathamsharma7711@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/pratham7711
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/pratham-sharma-a555b8207
- LeetCode: https://leetcode.com/pratham7711/
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/~prathamsharma7711
- Resume: https://www.prathamsharma.in/Pratham_Sharma_Resume.pdf
- Open to relocation: UAE, Germany, USA, Spain

## Experience

- Leegality (2025 — now, Software Engineer — Frontend): shipped an 18-component design system (+30% team velocity), an AI Chatbot SDK that cut support escalations 60%, and AI document review used by 2,000+ businesses.
- Salescode.AI (2023 — 2025, Software Engineer): cut a 6–9 hour enterprise data pipeline to under 5 minutes; Kafka event pipelines with +40% throughput and −25% latency for global FMCG clients.
- Realtos (2023, Software Engineer): built a PropTech platform frontend solo to production in 12 weeks, 500+ initial users, 99.99% uptime on AWS.

## Core skills

- Frontend: React, Next.js, TypeScript, GSAP, Three.js, Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Node.js, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis, GraphQL, Kafka
- AI / LLM: LangChain, RAG pipelines, Pinecone, OpenAI API, Gemini API, embeddings, vector search
- AI tooling: Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, agentic workflows, prompt engineering
- Infra: AWS, Vercel, Railway, Docker, CI/CD
- Also: CUDA kernel work (see Megakernel TTS project)

## Notable projects

- Megakernel TTS — adapted a 1,200-line persistent CUDA megakernel as the decode backend for Qwen3-TTS; ~25ms time-to-first-chunk (RTF 0.12) on an RTX 5090. https://github.com/pratham7711/e3-megakernel-tts-takehome
- DocMind AI — AI document intelligence with cited RAG answers in under 2 seconds (FastAPI, LangChain, Pinecone, Gemini). https://github.com/pratham7711/docmind-ai
- CollabBoard — real-time collaborative whiteboard, 10+ concurrent users at sub-100ms sync (WebSockets, Redis). https://github.com/pratham7711/collabboard
- @pratham7711/ui — 18-component React library on npm with Storybook docs and 200+ weekly downloads. https://www.npmjs.com/package/@pratham7711/ui

## Beyond code

- Volleyball: setter, captained his college team for two seasons (the portfolio is narrated as a volleyball match).
- Chess (Sicilian Najdorf), speedcubing (sub-90s 3×3, CFOP), long-arc anime.

- Affiliation: "Leegality"
